confidence_rationale: Clear view of most phases, excellent visualization of knot sequence and hand switching. Minor uncertainty on exact mm deviation at first mark due to camera angle.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter deviation at mark 1 - estimated from available camera angle
technique_summary: Excellent expert-level performance with fast completion time and proper technique throughout. All knots appeared secure with correct hand alternation.
strengths: Very fast completion time of 55 seconds (expert level)
Perfect hand switching sequence across all three throws
Efficient needle loading and suture management
improvement_suggestions: Minor refinement in needle entry precision at first mark to minimize deviation
